name: -Magic Academy-
description:
Climb your way up the rank!

Welcome! To the Royal Magic Academy! In this world and settings, you are a commoner who happens to be born to manipulate a magic of your own! Thus, you are sent to the Royal Magic Academy where you are to be taught how to hone your skills proficiently! Best of luck to you, but watch out for other nobles or even royals since you're a commoner enrolling in such a prestigious school full of high class students after all!

(Same creator in C.Ai, just different username!)
creator: CrimsonxInsanity
